title: W(3,3)-E8 Correspondence Theorem: Standard Model from Finite Geometry
description: A complete derivation of the Standard Model of particle physics from the W(3,3) generalized quadrangle and E8 Lie algebra correspondence. The theory proves 71 pillars connecting combinatorial, topological, and algebraic structures to gauge symmetries, fermion generations, coupling constants, and mass hierarchies -- with zero free parameters. All results are computationally verified by 882 automated tests.
notes: 71 proved pillars, 882 automated tests. Key predictions: sin^2(theta_W) = 3/8 (exact), alpha_GUT^{-1} = 8pi from W33 geometry, 3 generations topologically protected, spectral gap Delta = 4 ensures proton stability and confinement; CKM/PMNS and CP-violation invariants derived from complex Yukawa profiles; exact Z3 Yukawa texture selection rule constrains mass textures; Hessian/Heisenberg symmetry acts by a 648-element Heisenberg semidirect SL(2,3) group on the E6 27-set triads.
